  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Sawcut joints were executed too late, resulting in random shrinkage cracking (FD) outside the intended joint lines."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evaluate the depth and extent of the random cracks.",
    "Seal or repair the cracks using an approved epoxy or polymer-modified concrete repair system depending on structural/aesthetic requirements.",
    "Review joint-cutting schedule on future pours to ensure cuts are made within 4 to 12 hours of placement depending on temperature."
  ],
  "rationale": "The sawcut joints were not cut early enough to relieve internal tensile stresses, causing the concrete to crack randomly rather than along the planned joint lines. This violates standard practices outlined in ACI 302 and ACI 308.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 302.1R (Guide for Concrete Floor and Slab Construction)",
    "ACI 308R (Guide to External Curing of Concrete)"
  ]
}
